# Fireflies.ai

> AI Registry entry [AIR-9](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-9/firefliesai) — status **Production** as of 2026-04-06. Departments: finance, marketing, office-of-ceo, training.

**Category:** AI Meeting Transcription & Intelligence
**Cost per User/Month:** $29 (Business plan)
**Number of Licences:** 5
**Total Monthly Cost:** $145
**Departments:** All

## Overview

AI-powered meeting assistant — auto-joins, records, transcribes, summarises virtual meetings. Deployed universally as core infrastructure for meeting intelligence. Integrates with Meet, Zoom, Teams. Primary input source for AI Office's standup processing pipeline.

## Capabilities

* Automatic meeting recording (bot joins scheduled meetings)
* Real-time speaker-diarised transcription
* AI summaries, action items, decisions
* Topic tracking across meetings
* Soundbites
* Full-text search across all org meetings
* Channels (organise by team/project)
* Custom vocabulary
* GraphQL API

## Integrations

* Meet, Zoom, Teams, Webex
* [[salesforce|Salesforce]], HubSpot CRM
* [[asana|Asana]], Trello, Monday, Notion, [[linear|Linear]]
* Slack auto-share
* GraphQL API and webhooks

## Security & Compliance

* SOC 2 Type II, GDPR
* AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.2+ in transit
* SAML SSO on enterprise
* No training on customer data (Enterprise plan)

## Relevance

Foundational AI infrastructure. Every meeting auto-transcribed, creating searchable knowledge base. AI Office uses transcripts as input for standup processing pipeline — flowing into Notion and Linear.

## Enrichment notes

- **2026-06-12 (Assessify HR meeting):** new use case — dedicated interviews-only Fireflies instance, auto-attached to every interview booked through [[assessify]]; transcripts mapped back to candidates feed the post-interview scoring (post-assessment rubric). Provisioning **pending IT department** ([[jehad-altoutou|Jehad]] lacks Fireflies admin access). AIR-9 description and comment updated accordingly; status/priority/labels unchanged.

*Universal deployment. Core Infrastructure tier.*
